metadata.name: Analyze Tax Impact of New Equipment Purchase

description: A business is considering buying a new piece of equipment and wants to know the tax benefits, such as Section 179 deduction.

nodes.task_description: Gather the cost of the new equipment.
Determine if the equipment qualifies for the Section 179 deduction or bonus depreciation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the equipment is eligible for immediate expensing under Section 179.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the potential tax savings from the deduction based on the business's tax bracket.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides an estimated dollar amount of tax savings for the business.
